productDisplayName: Mother Earth Women Beige & Black Kurta
description: Style NoteThis piece from mother earth references the brand's environmentally sound principles into it's overall aesthetic. Capturing India's rich textile traditions in designs and styles that reflect the sentiment of the global citizen - this is the brand's USP. This kurta is crafted from a soft fabric that's passed through the hands of rural weavers and craftsmen, who've used time tested traditions passed on from generation to generation to craft this unique piece. Pair this with other cotton pieces to create the right impact.Product DetailsBeige printed kurta, has a wide boat neck, black yoke, short sleeves and a vented hemMaterial and Care100% cottonHand wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent as colour may bleedFlat dry inside out in shadeWarm ironDo not soak in waterSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
